source: Seattle 360 Engine — Music Theory Knowledge Nodes
application: Agent behavior mathematical functions in vehicle.js

functions.math: Three-phase cycle: approach (ii, tension building), dominant (V, peak tension), tonic (I, resolution)
functions.application: Agent foraging cycle: scan → pursue → consume. Modeled as sinusoidal with 3-phase envelope.
functions.formula: activity(t) = sin(2πt/T) where T varies by energy level

functions.math: Replace expected chord with chord a tritone (√2 frequency ratio) away — same tritone interval, different root
functions.application: Behavioral inversion: occasionally swap seek/flee weights. Agent pursues what it normally avoids.
functions.formula: P(inversion) = 0.002 per frame, duration = energy × 60 frames

functions.math: Multiple simultaneous rhythms with incommensurate periods create patterns that never exactly repeat
functions.application: Agent activity cycles: solar (24h) + tidal (12.4h) + lunar (29.5d) + seasonal (365d). Each species has its own period offset.
functions.formula: activity = Π sin(2πt/T_i + φ_i) for each cycle i

functions.math: Rule-breaking as generative principle — pioneer species colonize spaces where established rules don't apply
functions.application: Fireweed and alder plants germinate on bare ground where other plants won't. Agents with pioneer flag ignore normal territory constraints.

functions.math: Amplitude modulation of behavioral dynamics. E=1 is steady state, E=5 is maximum dynamic range.
functions.application: Maps to agent speed multiplier, perception radius, reproduction rate. Higher energy = more volatile behavior.

functions.math: Sinusoidal activity envelope keyed to sun altitude. Peak at civil twilight (-6° to +3°).
functions.application: Diurnal agents surge at dawn, nocturnal agents surge at dusk (tritone inversion of diurnal pattern).

functions.math: Start with harmonically rich waveform (saw = all harmonics at 1/n amplitude), remove frequencies with resonant low-pass filter, shape amplitude over time with ADSR envelope. Three parameters control the entire timbral space.
functions.application: Agent perception filtering: raw sensory input (all signals) → filter by relevance (low-pass = ignore high-frequency noise) → envelope shapes attention over time (attack=notice, decay=assess, sustain=track, release=forget).
functions.source: youtube/ZL8Tnq7KQqo — live synth demonstration: saw wave → filter down → envelope → second oscillator → movement
functions.rosetta: Electronics: RC low-pass filter. Ecology: sensory gating in prey species. Infrastructure: rate limiting. The filter is universal.

functions.concept: Patch routing (signal flow as file tree)
functions.math: Modular synthesis signal flow maps 1:1 to directory trees. A patch is a workflow. Modules are tasks. Each module has inputs (data), parameters (instructions), and outputs (tools). Sub-patches nest like subdirectories. The abstraction is fractal — zoom into any module and find the same structure.
functions.application: Agent architecture IS a patch bay. Route the right signal to the right module with the right parameters. Workflows = folders, tasks = files, instructions/tools/data = the three inputs every module needs. MCP servers = external CV inputs. Sub-agents = sub-patches.
functions.source: youtube/tbVtt2-qUJo — 'agent architecture as folders': file trees as the fundamental abstraction layer for AI agents, replacing framework code with directory structure
functions.rosetta: Electronics: patch bay, signal routing matrix. Infrastructure: microservice mesh, request routing. Ecology: mycorrhizal network routing nutrients between trees. The routing IS the architecture.

functions.math: Multiple oscillators at different frequencies/waveforms create complex timbres through additive interference. Detuning creates beat frequencies (f1-f2). Moving one oscillator against another creates evolving spectral content — the 'movement' in a pad sound.
functions.application: Multi-agent perception layers: each agent runs multiple 'oscillators' — fast cycle (frame-by-frame reaction), medium cycle (behavioral state), slow cycle (seasonal/energy). The interference between cycles produces emergent behavior that no single cycle contains.
functions.formula: behavior(t) = Σ A_i × wave_i(f_i × t + φ_i) where each oscillator has independent frequency and phase
functions.source: youtube/ZL8Tnq7KQqo — 'second wave, low wave, move it around': layering oscillators and modulating their relationship creates complexity from simple components
functions.rosetta: PRS polyrhythm: multiple clocks = multiple oscillators. The LCM of the periods defines the composite cycle length. Ecology: multiple overlapping territorial signals. The beat frequency between two bird songs IS a detuned oscillator pair.

functions.math: When a complex workflow becomes a single callable tool, the abstraction level shifts up. In synthesis: a complex patch becomes a preset. In agent architecture: a multi-step workflow becomes a single MCP tool. The condensation preserves function while hiding implementation. This is why frameworks get replaced — they operate at the wrong abstraction layer.
functions.application: Agent evolution: as behaviors mature, multi-step sequences condense into single reflexes. A foraging strategy that required scan→evaluate→approach→consume becomes a single 'forage' behavior. The sub-steps still execute, but the agent treats them as atomic. This matches biological skill acquisition — conscious steps become unconscious competence.
functions.source: youtube/tbVtt2-qUJo — 'if they condense your workflow into a feature update, it's now a subtask or a tool': the right abstraction layer absorbs platform changes instead of breaking
functions.rosetta: Music: a chord voicing condenses voice leading rules into a single hand position. Ecology: an ecosystem service condenses thousands of species interactions into a single function (pollination, decomposition). The condensation is the maturity.
